name: Setup Autopilot
description: Install and configure BMad Autopilot module settings, Telegram, and autonomy preset.

name: Run Autopilot
description: Execute the full story cycle for all remaining stories in a sprint.

name: Run Single Story
description: Execute the create-dev-review cycle for one specific story.

name: Resume Autopilot
description: Pick up from where a crashed or stopped run left off.

name: Configure Autopilot
description: Set or update autonomy preset and notification settings.

name: Autopilot Status
description: Show current autopilot state and next story.

name: Generate Dashboard
description: Generate a sprint run dashboard report (HTML or markdown).

name: Quick Sprint Summary
description: Quick one-line-per-story status for Telegram or terminal.
